Janitor LLM often encounters many problems such as: repeating messages too much, mistaking the wrong gender of the user or speaking on behalf of the user, etc. All are due to A.I. Also I'm just a bot creator and type prompt like everyone else, I can't avoid, control; or fix these risks. If you have any questions, please visit the Discord page of the creator of this website!

Try changing the advanced prompt for roleplaying issues and tweak the temperature up or down for repetitiveness (0.8 works best most of the time)

*Note: Sometimes in 'First Message' I edit a lot because of spelling mistakes or even change the scenario so when chatting, you can pay attention to it if uh you want to chat again..
